updates.heading: Gabe Cadavillo Departing End of Week
bullets: Gabe is leaving Gusto at the end of this week after 4+ years on the GTM pod
Leaving in great standing — please join in wishing him well
Backfill planning and req coverage will need to be addressed — reach out to Lisa with questions

updates.heading: Variable Comp: GTM Team Cleared to Communicate
bullets: Variable cash for salaried L1–L5 is now live — team is cleared to share verbally with candidates in pipeline
Variable targets: L1–L3: 5%, L4: 7.5%, L5: 10% (50% individual / 50% company performance split)
New Greenhouse offer field required — see org policy section for full details

updates.heading: HM Coverage Cadence Pilot — Testing Next Week
bullets: Lisa is piloting a monthly HM sync structure where each recruiter owns a set of HM Talent Advisor relationships
Testing next week via 1:1s: Gina→Sara Rawson, Grace→Tim Labeau, JT→Shawn Wilson, Will→Jess Moore
Recruiters need to retitle their 1:1 in Google Calendar (exact format), use Granola to transcribe, and then say 'Sync [HM name]'s notes' to Claude to push to Notion
Lisa will walk through the 10 monthly sync topics during 1:1

updates.heading: GTM Pod GEM Dashboard Now Live
bullets: Lisa launched a new real-time GEM dashboard for the GTM pod — populated via Greenhouse and GEM
Shows real-time signal of weekly/monthly/quarterly performance; click into data points to see GH source
Individual dashboards per recruiter are in progress (have bugs — using shared dashboard for now)
Feedback requested: missing data? Accuracy issues? Share with Lisa

updates.heading: Sales Enablement Training — August 3 Start Date Confirmed
bullets: August start date for Sales Enablement Training is confirmed as August 3
Applies to: Gina Panacci, Grace Stoughton, John Thomas

updates.heading: Cycle 2 Initiative: Headcount & Capacity Planning Discovery (DRI: Lisa + Jaime)
bullets: Lisa and Jaime are DRIs on the Headcount & Capacity Planning Discovery & Framework initiative for Cycle 2
Headcount planning audit doc (6 sections) was due EOD June 10 from all PEs
Goal: understand how planning works across orgs today and build a better aligned process
